* TAR.<LUGAL?>.LU

MUŠEN la₃ KUR AŠ₂

: The rooster

bird (which presages) not achieving a wish

* na-aṣ-na-ṣu-u

bird (which presages) not achieving a wish

r 1010

* tu₁₅U₁₉.LU de₂-a

AD DINGIR-MEŠ

father of the gods

r 1111

* tu₁₅KUR.RA dEN.LIL₂

EN gim-riša₂-a-ri

: The east wind - Ellil,

lord of all

r 1212

mistress of breezes

r 1313

* tu₁₅MAR.TU da-nu₃

AD AN-MEŠ

: The west wind - Anu,

father of heaven

r 2424

[...]-a-ni AMAR mdMAŠ—DU₃—PAB-MEŠ

[...]ani, offspring of Inurta-bani-ahhe.

1The broken name could be either [{d}ŠUL.PA.E₃].$DAR.A (cf. An Anum II 56, TCL 15, 10 r ii 8) or [{d}NIN].DAR.A (cf. TCL 15, 10 r ii 7, An Anum III 65).
